questions.question: Determine if the vector w = (7, 5, 3) is in the span of v₁ = (1, 2, 3) and v₂ = (4, 5, 6).
expectedPoints: Set up the equation c₁v₁ + c₂v₂ = w
Conclude based on whether a solution exists

questions.question: Prove that any set of vectors containing the zero vector is linearly dependent. Discuss the implications of this result.
expectedPoints: State the definition of linear dependence
Show explicitly how to get a nontrivial combination equal to zero
Explain why this means the set is dependent
Discuss how this affects finding bases
